subcodes.first_line: O thou who art stirred by the breeze of the Covenant! Thy letter was received and perused, and its meaning was understood. It expressed humility and fervent supplication [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهتز از نفحه میثاق مرقوم مقروء شد مضمون مفهوم گردید عجز و الحاح بود و تبتل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant, @prayer for forgiveness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
